title: centrostachys diandra
intro: Centrostachys diandra, also known as "Tara" or "Tara tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centrostachys diandra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Centrostachys diandra is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues.
